source_jobs.title: Strategy & Operations Associate
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

For a long time, Farsight has been best-in-class at deliverables generation and iteration. Unlike general AI finance platforms that focus primarily on research, Farsight has spent years focused on producing high-quality, personalized end deliverables. This has given us a meaningful advantage in capturing judgment data: the comments, edits, and nuances a partner makes on a deck or model as it travels from first draft to final version.

Our platform enables teams to deliver full client-ready documents natively in Microsoft Office Suite (slide decks, CIMs, financial models, memos) end-to-end. By using your firm’s historical best practices and voice there are no generic outputs. Everything is aligned to your brand.

Security, scale, and precision matter. We operate with SOC-2 compliance, full end-to-end encryption, and deployment options from customer-cloud to on-premise.

Our team is made up of Strategy & Ops members with backgrounds from: J.P. Morgan, Morgan Stanley, Evercore, General Atlantic, Mizuho, Barclays, and more!




ROLE OVERVIEW

As a member of the Strategy & Operations Associate, you’ll be the connective tissue across Farsight: translating ideas into execution across product, engineering, customer success, and leadership.

You’ll partner closely with engineers to help design and shape new product lines. You’ll work hand-in-hand with customers — from onboarding to advanced workflow design — ensuring each client is successful and fully activated. You’ll help define platform direction, prioritize features, and operationalize strategic initiatives. This is a high-leverage, multi-disciplinary role for someone who thrives in ambiguity and wants to directly shape a category-defining company.

We are entirely based in Manhattan, New York City, and are in-person 4 days a week (except Fridays, which are remote).




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Partner with engineering to scope, test, and launch net-new features and workflows.

 - Serve as a hands-on advisor to strategic customers, guiding onboarding, product setup, and early use-case design.

 - Work directly with users to build and deploy customized workflows using Farsight’s platform.

 - Gather feedback and frontline insights to help shape product roadmap and feature prioritization.

 - Drive cross-functional initiatives that require coordination across the whole organization.

 - Help build internal systems and playbooks to scale operations as the company grows.

 - Contribute to go-to-market motion by translating platform capabilities into clear, value-driven narratives.




WHO YOU ARE

 - 2 - 4 years of experience in investment banking and/or private equity.

 - Deep comfort working across functions with high ambiguity

 - Strong communication and project management skills — you’re able to turn ambiguity into action.

 - Scrappy and entrepreneurial: you’re willing to figure things out without a playbook.

 - Analytical thinker who’s excited to work with technical teams and complex products.

 - Obsessed with quality. You’re not satisfied until things work and scale.

 - NYC-based and able to work onsite as needed.




NICE-TO-HAVE

 - Experience / interest in enterprise SaaS, B2B AI platforms, or fintech/financial services

 - Familiarity with tools like PowerPoint, Excel, CRMs, and data room platforms

 - Technical background or experience working closely with engineers




COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

 - Salary range: $110,000 to $150,000 annually, commensurate with experience.

 - Equity is provided to all of our employees

 - Comprehensive medical, dental and vision insurance

 - Unlimited PTO



Note: You'll need valid U.S. work authorization to join us.

Please note that a background check and employment verification may be required for this position. We may obtain one or more background screening reports about you, solely for employment purposes.



Equal Opportunity

Farsight is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity and Affirmative Action employer. We d

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Farsight AI

Farsight is the agentic AI platform for financial services, currently helping investment banks and private equity firms fully automate entire, highly nuanced workflows. Today, institutions will spend 80% of their time gathering information for and creating first drafts of materials by hand before iterating on and refining their decks, models, and pitches.

Farsight not only gives them that time back to focus on what is important, but we also bring new insights and knowledge to their materials that they wouldn’t be able to uncover without the help of our financial-focused AI.

Our Team

Our team has had a wide range of experience that uniquely equips us to capture this massive opportunity. Our team comes from leading financial institutions like Evercore, General Atlantic and Menlo Ventures, supercharged by scalable engineering and AI skills from companies including Amazon, Hugging Face and the MIT Media Lab. We've learned the ins and outs of building successful startups with a team of former founders and founding engineers. We focus on hiring the best so that we can become the best, so we hope you apply!

We are entirely based in Manhattan, New York City, and are in-person 4 days a week (except Fridays, which are remote).



Job Description

Farsight operates at the cutting-edge of AI to deliver human-like work within some of the world’s largest, and most critical, financial organizations. We have an extensive backlog from customer demand along with immense opportunities for product innovation. As such, we require someone that will not only ship features but will also move the ball forward towards a unified and expansive platform offering.



You will have full ownership of projects that you will have to design, implement, and deploy at scale in a highly fluid and fast-paced startup environment. While you will have to create clean, efficient, and ready-for-change software, you will also have to listen to customer feedback, prioritize work streams, and gauge quality of outputs with a critical lens. On the software side specifically, your work will range from longer-term research projects to bug fixes alike - all of which crucial to our company’s success.



Farsight is a highly collaborative environment where you and your highly motivated, passionate team members will continuously be working together to create new technology and applications that deliver the robust, accurate, market-changing solutions that our customers have come to expect.



Desired Qualifications

 - 4+ years of full-time software engineering experience

 - Deep knowledge and experience with building full-stack, user-friendly applications ready for scale

 - Experience with Typescript, Python, and cloud-based infrastructure like AWS

 - Strong interest in learning and understanding generative AI technology and the current, rapidly evolving landscape

 - Experience working in unstructured environments, where you took full autonomy in delivering projects from conception to deployment

 - You are intrinsically motivated and self-critical of your work, two aspects that are important for rapid innovation on a lean team

 - Are able to effectively communicate with and collaborate with a growing team

 - Bring a positive and fun attitude to the workplace!



Above and Beyond Qualifications

 - Former early engineer or founder at a fast-growing startup

 - Previous AI research and/or interactions with AI systems, including utilizing closed-source models, fine-tuning and spinning up open-sourced models, etc.

 - Deep understanding of scalable system design, performance optimization, and resilience engineering

 - Extensive front-end experience in tandem with some experience in UI / UX design work

 - Previous experience interacting with customers and receiving customer feedback

 - Have leadership experience in a technical position



Compensation & Benefits

 - Base salary ranges between $150,000 and $200,000 annually depending on level of experien

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Farsight AI

Farsight is the agentic AI platform for financial services, currently helping investment banks and private equity firms fully automate entire, highly nuanced workflows. Today, institutions will spend 80% of their time gathering information for and creating first drafts of materials by hand before iterating on and refining their decks, models, and pitches.

Farsight not only gives them that time back to focus on what is important, but we also bring new insights and knowledge to their materials that they wouldn’t be able to uncover without the help of our financial-focused AI.

Our Team

Our team has had a wide range of experience that uniquely equips us to capture this massive opportunity. Our team comes from leading financial institutions like Evercore, General Atlantic and Menlo Ventures, supercharged by scalable engineering and AI skills from companies including Amazon, Hugging Face and the MIT Media Lab. We've learned the ins and outs of building successful startups with a team of former founders and founding engineers. We focus on hiring the best so that we can become the best, so we hope you apply!

We are entirely based in Manhattan, New York City, and are in-person 4 days a week (except Fridays, which are remote).



Job Description

We have an extensive backlog from customer demand along with immense opportunities for product innovation, and as such need someone that can help rapidly expand our platform to be able to supercharge each of our users.

You will be responsible for designing and implementing complete technical systems, informed from business needs and often directly addressing customer feedback. Being at the interface between customer and product, you will have to move extremely quickly - all while upholding our standard of developing clean, efficient, and ready for change software. The scope of your projects will range from longer term swings to bug fixes alike, each of which crucial to our company's success.



Desired Qualifications

 - 2+ years of non-internship software engineering experience

 - Experience with building applications ready for both scale and production deployment

 - Experience with Python and cloud-based infrastructure like AWS

 - Strong interest in learning and understanding generative AI technology and the current, rapidly evolving landscape

 - Experience working in unstructured environments, where you took full autonomy of delivering projects from conception to deployment



Above and Beyond Qualifications

 - Have previously worked at either an early-stage startup or big tech

 - Previous development experience with AI systems, including utilizing closed-source models, fine-tuning and spinning up open-sourced models, etc.

 - Understanding of system design patterns and test-driven development techniques in order to create reliable, ready for change code

 - Previous experience interacting with customers and receiving customer feedback



Compensation & Benefits

 - Salary ranges between $120,000 and $150,000 annually depending on the level of experience of the applicant.

 - Equity: Meaningful early-stage package with standard vesting (4 year / 1-year cliff)

 - Comprehensive medical, dental and vision insurance

 - Unlimited PTO



Equal Opportunity

Farsight is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity and Affirmative Action employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, gender expression, transgender status, sexual stereotypes, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. We also consider qualified applicants with criminal histories, consistent with applicable federal, state and local law.

source_jobs.title: Founding Sales Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
About Farsight

Farsight is the agentic AI platform for financial services, currently helping investment banks and private equity firms fully automate entire, highly nuanced workflows. Today, institutions will spend 80% of their time gathering information for and creating first drafts of materials by hand before iterating on and refining their decks, models, and pitches. We not only give them that time back to focus on what is important, but we also bring new insights and knowledge to their materials that they wouldn’t be able to uncover without the help of our financial-focused AI.

Our Team

Our team has had a wide range of experience that uniquely equips us to capture this massive opportunity. Our team comes from leading financial institutions like Evercore, General Atlantic and Menlo Ventures, supercharged by scalable engineering and AI skills from companies including Amazon, Hugging Face and the MIT Media Lab. We've learned the ins and outs of building successful startups from previous work as founders and founding engineers. We focus on hiring the best so that we can become the best, so we hope you apply!

We are entirely based in Manhattan, New York City, and are in-person 4 days a week (except Fridays, which are remote).

Job Description

Farsight operates at the cutting-edge of AI to deliver human-like work within some of the world’s largest, and most critical, financial organizations. Demand in the market for AI solutions is soaring, and Farsight takes a truly differentiated approach.

You will play a critical role in shaping sales playbooks, strategies and more as the company begins to transition away from founder-led sales. This is a high-upside opportunity to help drive the GTM motion of an incredibly unique product and value proposition, in a highly lucrative industry. Much of the role will involve working hand-in-hand with the founders to help hit Farsight's next chapter of growth.

Farsight is a highly collaborative environment where you and your highly motivated, passionate team members will continuously be working together to create new technology and applications that deliver the robust, accurate, market-changing solutions that our customers have come to expect.

Desired Qualifications

 - 2+ years of enterprise sales experience, with experience in the mid-market as well

 - Experience with software sales, with a track record of meeting or exceeding targets

 - Strong interest in learning and understanding generative AI technology and the current, rapidly evolving landscape

 - Experience working in unstructured environments, experimenting with sales strategies and refining GTM plans

 - You are intrinsically motivated and self-critical of your work, two aspects that are important for rapid iteration and improvement

 - Are able to effectively communicate with and collaborate with a growing team

 - Bring a positive and fun attitude to the workplace!

Above and Beyond Qualifications

 - Formerly served in a sales role at a fast-growing startup

 - Experience selling to financial institutions (i.e. banks, private equity funds, hedge funds)

 - Familiarity with AI technology, broadly

 - Previous experience interacting with existing customers and receiving customer feedback

Compensation & Benefits

 - Base salary between $65,000 and $90,000 annually (dependent on total experience)

 - Commission

 - Highly competitive medical, dental, and vision insurance,

 - Unlimited PTO are included in the benefits.

Highly competitive medical, dental, and vision insurance, along with unlimited PTO are included in the benefits.

source_jobs.title: Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT FARSIGHT AI

Farsight is the agentic AI platform for financial services, currently helping investment banks and private equity firms fully automate entire, highly nuanced workflows. Today, institutions will spend 80% of their time gathering information for and creating first drafts of materials by hand before iterating on and refining their decks, models, and pitches.

Farsight not only gives them that time back to focus on what is important, but we also bring new insights and knowledge to their materials that they wouldn’t be able to uncover without the help of our financial-focused AI.

Our Team

Our team has had a wide range of experience that uniquely equips us to capture this massive opportunity. Our team comes from leading financial institutions like Evercore, General Atlantic and Menlo Ventures, supercharged by scalable engineering and AI skills from companies including Amazon, Hugging Face and the MIT Media Lab. We've learned the ins and outs of building successful startups with a team of former founders and founding engineers. We focus on hiring the best so that we can become the best, so we hope you apply!

We are entirely based in Manhattan, New York City, and are in-person 4 days a week (except Fridays, which are remote).




THE ROLE

This is Farsight's first dedicated Product Manager hire, reporting directly to the CTO. It is a high-ownership, high-visibility role that sits at the center of our product, engineering, and customer teams. You will be responsible for translating the needs of users in the financial services space into a clear product vision, and working directly with our engineering team to bring that vision to life quickly and with precision.

You will own the product roadmap, drive prioritization decisions, and be the connective tissue between what our customers are asking for, interacting with our Strategy & Ops teams (with many ex-bankers), and what our engineers are building. Given the complexity of our agentic workflows and the nuance of our financial services customers, this role will suit someone who is both deeply curious about AI and fluent in the language of investment banking and private equity.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Own the product roadmap and drive prioritization across engineering, design, and GTM

 - Work directly with Investment Banking and Private Equity customers to deeply understand their workflows, pain points, and feedback, and translate those into clear product requirements

 - Partner closely with engineering to scope, spec, and ship features that meet our standard of clean, accurate, and auditable AI outputs

 - Define and track the right metrics to measure product success in a non-deterministic AI system

 - Serve as the internal voice of the customer, ensuring every product decision is grounded in real workflow impact
   
   


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 6+ years of product management experience, with at least 2 years in a senior or lead PM role at a startup or high-growth tech company

 - Deep familiarity with investment banking or private equity workflows, either from direct experience in finance or from building products used by IB and PE teams

 - Strong technical fluency. You do not need to write code, but you need to understand how AI systems work, what makes them reliable, and where they break

 - A proven track record of shipping products in ambiguous, fast-moving environments where you took full ownership from problem to launch
   
   


ABOVE AND BEYOND QUALIFICATIONS

 - Previous experience as a founder or first PM at an AI-native startup

 - Hands-on experience with LLMs, agentic systems, or AI workflow products

 - Background in financial services, including investment banking, private equity, or fintech

 - Experience working directly with enterprise customers and incorporating their feedback into product decisions


COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

 - Base salary: $160,000 – $200,000, commensurate with experience

 - Equity: Meaningful early-stage package with

source_jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Farsight AI

Farsight is the agentic AI platform for financial services, currently helping investment banks and private equity firms fully automate entire, highly nuanced workflows. Today, institutions will spend 80% of their time gathering information for and creating first drafts of materials by hand before iterating on and refining their decks, models, and pitches. We not only give them that time back to focus on what is important, but we also bring new insights and knowledge to their materials that they wouldn’t be able to uncover without the help of our financial-focused AI.

Our Team

Our team has had a wide range of experience that uniquely equips us to capture this massive opportunity. Our team comes from leading financial institutions like Evercore, General Atlantic and Menlo Ventures, supercharged by scalable engineering and AI skills from companies including Amazon, Hugging Face and the MIT Media Lab. We've learned the ins and outs of building successful startups from previous work as founders and founding engineers. We focus on hiring the best so that we can become the best, so we hope you apply!

We are entirely based in Manhattan, New York City, and are in-person 4 days a week (except Fridays, which are remote).

The Role

Farsight operates at the cutting edge of AI to deliver human-like work within some of the world's largest and most critical financial organizations. As a Frontend Engineer, you will be responsible for designing and building the interfaces through which our users experience that work. You'll be turning powerful agentic outputs into seamless, intuitive product experiences for investment banking, private equity, and more!

You will work directly at the interface between customer and product, moving quickly to address real feedback while upholding our standard of clean, efficient, and ready-for-change software. The scope of your projects will range from longer-term platform investments to rapid iteration on customer-facing features. Each one will be crucial to our company's success.

Desired Qualifications

 - 4+ years of non-internship software engineering experience

 - Strong proficiency in React and modern JavaScript/TypeScript

 - Experience building production-grade, scalable web applications

 - A sharp eye for clean, functional UI. You care deeply about how things feel, not just how they work

 - Experience working in unstructured environments where you took full autonomy of projects from conception to deployment

 - Intrinsically motivated and self-critical, with the ability to move fast on a lean team

 - Strong communicator who collaborates effectively across a growing team

 - Positive, fun attitude and a genuine passion for building great products

Above and Beyond Qualifications

 - Previous experience at an early-stage startup or big tech

 - Experience building interfaces for AI or data-heavy products

 - Familiarity with financial services workflows or client environments

 - Experience interacting directly with customers and incorporating their feedback into product decisions

 - Comfort with backend or infrastructure work. We all wear many hats

Compensation

 - Base salary: $150,000 – $180,000

 - Meaningful equity at Series A

notes: Farsight AI is a financial services AI platform with a strong engineering focus.
